prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-FIXEDBLADETANTOKNIFE-BLK-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 8.5 Inch Fixed Blade Tanto Knife Full Tang Survival Companion with Sheath and Belt Loop, Black Description: Be prepared for adventure and adversity with ASR Outdoors 8.5 Inch Full Tang Fixed Blade Tanto Knife. Matte black finish, two cutting planes, strong angled tip, 440 stainless steel blade, partial serrated spine, ergonomic handle and long quillon guard, this knife has a notable list of features that make with worth carrying!

Classic tanto design featuring two cutting planes, one through the length of the blade and another at its tip. And, as an added bonus, this tanto knife also features a tough serrated spine for cutting and sawing in the field if needed. The razor sharp, 440 stainless steel fixed blade is designed for piercing power and cutting performance, making it ideal for tough outdoor tasks, self defense, bushcraft, survival, hunting and more, while the full tang construction ensures maximum strength and reliability.

Notably, the handle is manufactured from a lightweight but durable plastic and features a unique ridged texture and finger groves for enhanced grip. The tanto knife also comes with a long quillon or guard for wielder protection and slippage (blade measures 4.5 inches long). Ideal for piercing, slashing, cutting, chopping and scraping, this tanto knife makes a great hunting knife, tactical knife or tool to include with survival gear and supplies.

For added convenience, this knife comes with a durable sheath with a belt loop, allowing for safe and easy carry on your belt or outdoor gear. Whether exploring the wilderness, hunting, or preparing a survival kit, this tanto knife is built to handle it all. Search Terms: hunting knife; outdoor gear; emergency preparedness items; survival tools; camping essentials; wilderness first aid kit; bushcraft tools; knife with sheath; fixed blade knife; pocket knife for men; edc; tanto knife; hunting gear; gifts for men Features: - MATTE BLACK TANTO KNIFE: Classic tanto design featuring two cutting planes, one through the length of the blade and another at its tip; as an added bonus, this tanto knife also features a tough serrated spine for cutting and sawing when needed - FULL TANG FIXED BLADE KNIFE: Design offers superior strength and durability, while providing excellent balance and control during cutting actions; solid construction minimizes the risk of blade breakage or handle detachment, providing a long lasting and dependable tool - 440 STAINLESS STEEL BLADE: Features excellent edge retention and is corrosion resistant; handle is lightweight plastic with ridged texture and finger groves for enhanced grip, and features a long quillon for wielder protection and slippage (blade measures 4.5 inches long) - HUNTING & SURVIVAL GEAR: Ideal for piercing, slashing, cutting, chopping and scraping, this tanto knife makes a great hunting knife, tactical knife or tool to include with survival gear and supplies - KNIFE SHEATH WITH BELT LOOP: Sheath featuring a belt loop ensures safe storage and easy on person carrying for quick access; handle also comes with built in lanyard hole (not included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.5 Inch Black Fixed Blade Tanto Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang 440 Stainless Steel, Serrated Spine, Includes Sheath With Belt Loop, Hunting And Survival
